description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a thick layer of white icing covering the top and dripping slightly over the sides. The cake's sides are coated in purple icing and feature bold, black, hand-written text that wraps around the circumference. The top of the cake is decorated with numerous tall, spiral-patterned candles, each with a visible orange flame. The writing on the cake appears playful and informal, and the overall style is whimsical and celebratory. No display container or plate is visible beneath the cake, and the surface finish is matte with a slightly uneven, homemade appearance.
description: A round, purple cake with white icing, black hand-written text, and many lit spiral candles on top. The style is playful and celebratory, with no visible display container.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's purple sides, white icing top, and a row of lit spiral candles; the black text is partially visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights more of the black text wrapping around the cake and shows the candles from a slight angle.
description_view_2: The back view reveals additional text on the cake's side and a clear view of the candle arrangement.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the remaining side text and the back row of candles, with the flames still visible.
